summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 資料中心建設需求強勁，公司財報表現優異並獲分析師調升評級與目標價，市場動能極佳。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Upgrades Quanta Services to Outperform, Announces $800 Price Target
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 分析師 Brent Thielman 將評級調升至 Outperform，並給出 800 美元的高目標價，顯示對公司執行力與成長前景的高度信心。

bullish.title: A Look At Quanta Services (PWR) Valuation After Exceptional Quarter And Higher Full Year Outlook
bullish.reason: 公司第一季財報表現優異，且管理層上調全年財測，反映出強勁的營運基本面與市場需求。

bullish.title: 3 Top-Ranked AI Construction Stocks With Double-Digit Near-Term Upside
bullish.reason: AI 驅動的資料中心建設需求持續推升公司營收，被視為具備雙位數成長潛力的頂級建設股。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Inc. (PWR) Screens Strongly for High Growth Momentum and Minervini Trend Template
bullish.reason: 符合 Mark Minervini 的成長動能篩選標準，顯示股價處於強勁的上升趨勢中，吸引動能投資人關注。

bullish.title: Quanta Adds Supply Chain Veteran Joseph Kim To Guide Execution And Capital Returns
bullish.reason: 任命供應鏈專家 Joseph Kim 加入董事會，有助於強化公司執行力與資本回報策略。

bullish.title: Is Quanta Services (PWR) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
bullish.reason: 華爾街平均經紀商建議 (ABR) 維持在買入評級，顯示市場對該股的整體樂觀情緒。

bullish.title: Dow Jones Leader Amazon, AI Stock Quanta, Monster Beverage In Or Near Buy Zones
bullish.reason: 被市場觀察家列為處於買入區間的強勢股，受惠於整體股市反彈行情。

bullish.title: Here is Why Growth Investors Should Buy Quanta Services (PWR) Now
bullish.reason: 強調公司具備穩健的成長屬性，適合成長型投資人長期持有。

bearish.title: Can Quanta Navigate Tariffs, Inflation & Still Deliver EPS Growth?
bearish.reason: 市場擔憂關稅、通膨與供應鏈風險可能壓縮利潤率，對公司維持 EPS 高成長的能力提出質疑。

neutral.title: Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) Presents at Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference Transcript
neutral.reason: 公司參與投資人會議，主要為例行性業務說明，未有重大突發消息。

neutral.title: Is Dycom Industries (DY) Stock Outpacing Its Construction Peers This Year?
neutral.reason: 僅為同業績效比較分析，未對 Quanta Services 本身營運產生直接影響。
